---
title: "Data Entry"
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Data Entry}
  %\VignetteEngine{quarto::html}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <script>document.head.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend','<style>.container.template-quarto{max-width:100%!important}main#main{max-width:100%!important;flex:0 0 100%!important}</style>');</script>
---

```{=html}
<iframe id="bayesma-app"
        src="https://019df2c0-f0e0-e1fe-274c-b80a87774a31.share.connect.posit.cloud/"
        style="width: 100%; border: none; display: block;"
        scrolling="no">
</iframe>

<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@iframe-resizer/parent@5"></script>
<script>
  iframeResize({ license: "GPLv3", waitForLoad: true }, "#bayesma-app");
</script>
```
